case_title: FREEMAN RUSSELL G VS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY FREEMAN RUSSELL G AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
